headline: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (JBHT) PT Increased at ISI as Analyst Sees Transport Sector Rebound
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Large-Cap Stocks with Insider Buying in 2026. J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. is among the best stocks with insider buying. TheFly reported on March 26 that ISI increased its price objective for JBHT to $232 from $222 while keeping an Outperform rating. The analyst noted that recent […]
